历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, the lowest rank for science was approximately 6275 (including abnormal fluctuations), in 2023 about 1297, in 2024 about 1464, and in 2025 for physics category about 882; the rankings in the past three years fluctuated between 882 and 1464, with a baseline of about 882 in 2025, showing a forward trend; the enrollment plan for this university in Ningxia science group: 12 in 2022, 3 in 2023, 5 in 2024, 13 in 2025 for physics category; in 2026, the physics category plan is 7, a reduction of about 46% compared to 2025, significantly intensifying competition, and rankings are expected to move forward.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked about 19th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, stable in the Top20 in recent years, belonging to the top national comprehensive normal university; in 2026, reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving school management public opinion responses, with no obvious negative impact; Douyin popularity ranking 37th (relatively hot), short video exposure medium to high, application attention stable; Education A+, Psychology A+, Chinese Language and Literature A+, Geography A+, Marxist Theory A+, and 18 other A- and above disciplines, with extremely strong disciplinary strength, highly attractive to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of normal/education majors is divided and wait-and-see; popularity of science majors (mathematics, physics, chemistry) and psychology is stable; in 2026, the number of physics category candidates in this province is about 44,550, basically unchanged from 2025; the provincial control line for 2025 physics category undergraduate batch is 372 points, down from 432 points for the 2024 science first batch, reflecting changes in exam difficulty or candidate structure; Beijing Normal University is located in Beijing, which has a strong attraction for candidates from western provinces; the university enrolls a small number in Ningxia (13 in 2025 physics category → 7 in 2026), belonging to small-scale enrollment, with large fluctuations in rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline rank of 882, the significant reduction in the 2026 physics category plan to 7 (a 46% reduction), the stable number of candidates in the province, and the top level of the school, the ranking is expected to move forward significantly; the predicted minimum rank is about 623, with a range of 561–685.
